introSection: Crazy Mouse is a travelling spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned by US carnival operator Amusements of America.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Yellow track with light blue and pink supports.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse is a travelling spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned by US carnival operator Amusements of America.



Yellow track with light blue and pink supports.




 * Official webpage
